integration_point: CalibratedEloMatchModel._dc_sample — DC scoreline PMF reweighted so W/D/L marginals match a 0.5/0.5 ensemble of DC-implied and ML-logistic 1X2.
why_safe: Reweighting scales the 3 win/draw/loss regions of the joint scoreline PMF; the conditional scoreline distribution WITHIN each region is preserved (verified np.allclose).
Goal-difference distribution intact -> group tiebreakers unaffected.
Draw scorelines preserved -> knockout ET/penalty logic unaffected.
Extra-time increment PMF is NOT reweighted (ML predicts full-match 1X2, not ET-conditional).
Rollback verified: use_ml=False reproduces the Elo-only distribution exactly.
why_justified: Match-level: ML beats Elo-only (Brier 0.508<0.529). Tournament walk-forward set weight to 0.20 (down from 0.50) for upset robustness.
honest_caveats: Weight reduced 0.50 -> 0.20 by WC2018+WC2022 walk-forward: 0.50 overconcentrated favorites (hurt the WC2018 upset).
ML helps when the favorite wins, hurts on upsets; 0.20 limits but does not remove this.
next_step: Tournament-level walk-forward CV (refit beta per held-out WC, score champion Brier with vs without ML ensemble) to confirm the favorite concentration is calibrated, then tune the 0.5 weight.
